name: ndh-aed-prediction
description: NDH AED 病人數量預測系統 v5.5.00 — World-class accuracy v5.5: 92-feature pipeline + 5-bucket per-horizon split (short/h7/h14/h21/h30) + holiday-type embedding + HKO 9-day forecast injection at inference + XGBoost (Optuna) + LightGBM + N-BEATS + TFT 4-learner ensemble + Conformalized Quantile Regression CI with online calibration + Hierarchical Bayesian shrinkage + capped bias correction with auto-fallback. Honest walk-forward MAE 13.84 / MAPE 6.04% on Railway DB (4186 days), down from v5.0.00 MAE 17.94 (−22.9%).

scripts.postinstall: node scripts/install-python-deps.js || echo 'Python dependencies installation skipped'

author: Ma Tsz Kiu
